title: No pagination on GET /books
evidence: app.py:122-136 list_books returns the full table unconditionally (SELECT * FROM books)
suggestion: Add optional ?limit and ?offset query params for large collections

title: No format validation for year/isbn
evidence: app.py:102-103 accepts year and isbn without type/format checks; a non-integer year is stored as-is
suggestion: Validate year is an integer and isbn matches an ISBN pattern, returning 400 otherwise

title: Author filter uses substring LIKE match
evidence: app.py:129-132 filters with LIKE '%author%', so ?author=Orwell also matches partial names; task said 'filter' without specifying exact vs substring
suggestion: Confirm substring matching is intended; document it in README

title: Committed books.db build artifact in archive
evidence: books.db (12KB) present in run_dir alongside source
suggestion: None required; noted for cross-run cleanliness comparison
